storyInfo: The huntress Joanna takes Enya home and treats her injuries, but begins to keep her distance upon discovering that Enya is the Saintess. Arctosz suspects the Browntails of planning the assassinations, driving a rift again between the three clans.

attributes.content: This is...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: My home.
attributes.name: Young Huntress

attributes.content: Last I saw, they were going the opposite way. It's safe here. I'll wrap you up, and then you need to leave.
attributes.name: Young Huntress

attributes.content: Thank you. I—
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Don't talk and don't fidget, Silverash.
attributes.name: Young Huntress

attributes.content: Your wounds aren't that bad. There was some distance, and your thick clothes absorbed some of the impact.
attributes.name: Young Huntress

attributes.content: But the bolt has a hooked head. It'll hurt when I pull it out. I'll try to be steady.
attributes.name: Young Huntress

attributes.content: The young huntress snaps the arrow shaft and grabs the remaining part. She glances at the wounded woman, who simply nods, showing no sign of fear.
The huntress takes a deep breath and slowly pulls the arrow. Even she shivers at the sensation of the hook grating against flesh.
She does her best to keep her hands steady, until the arrowhead is completely pulled out.
Phew—finally...
attributes.name: Young Huntress

attributes.content: Thank you... very much...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: I'm not done yet. Hang in there a little longer.
attributes.name: Young Huntress

attributes.content: She takes out a packet of powdered medicine, lifts the edge of Enya's dress, and rubs it skillfully on the wound before bandaging it up.
You can yelp if it hurts. I won't laugh.
attributes.name: Young Huntress

attributes.content: I don't want to make you more nervous.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: It'll only hurt more if your hands are shaking.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Hmph.
attributes.name: Young Huntress

attributes.content: ...Huh?
attributes.name: Young Huntress

attributes.content: A slender, snow-white cloudbeast pokes its head out of the huntress's hood, hanging onto her braids with its claws and poking its wet nose around Enya's fur collar.
Then, it reaches out to sniff at the stranger's scent.
Don't touch it. It doesn't like strangers.
attributes.name: Young Huntress

attributes.content: Before the huntress can finish, Enya's finger has already reached the little cloudbeast's chin. Simply touching its soft fur seems to bring warmth to her heart, even in the bitter cold.
(Whisper) Get back in, Rift Cloudbeast...
attributes.name: Young Huntress

attributes.content: You call it... the Rift Cloudbeast?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Come to think of it, I don't know your name yet, my hero.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Joanna.
attributes.name: Young Huntress

attributes.content: I don't need to know your name, Silverash. Don't think for a moment that we're friends.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Why? You've been good to me.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: And how have you people treated me?!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Hmph... forget it. Nothing to do with you, anyway.
attributes.name: Young Huntress

attributes.content: By 'you people', do you mean Clan Silverash?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Or Enciodes...?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Not just him.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: My dad says the Silverashes have been obsessed with blaspheming Kjeragandr ever since Enciodes's father was clan leader.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: He poured asphalt on Kjeragandr's backbone, and poison on Kjeragandr's tail. His greed led to his downfall.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Enciodes hasn't learned his lesson. He's done even more to wreck Kjeragandr's peace.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: But his greatest sin was the hole he dug in Kjeragandr's flesh. This disaster is proof that Silverash has angered Kjeragandr.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: But Kjerag can't stay in the snowy mountains forever.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Haven't industry and trade brought us better lives? Why would the kind Kjeragandr punish us just because we're living better lives?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Better lives?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: You Silverashes sit by the warm fireside, eating the best food and drinking the best wine...
attributes.name: Joanna
Joanna
attributes.content: But who has to pay the price?

attributes.name: Joanna
attributes.content: Us, we do!
Many beasts lived at the foot of the mountains when I was little.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: For a thousand years they lived off the land—drank from the rivers, and went back to the forest to find berries and leaves.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: But Karlan Trade's railroads divided the mountains and rivers, forcing the beasts to risk their lives crossing the railway.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: You even blame them when your trains run them over!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: The beasts were forced to move higher, but there isn't enough room there for large packs. They had to fight each other for space and food, and their numbers dwindled.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Not to mention all the cloudbeasts that are sensitive to noise... you have no idea how many died, and how I ended up taking in my Rift Cloudbeast!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: But the farmers by the mountains need the fertilizers and seeds that the trains bring. And sick people on the mountains need medicine.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Where's the bountiful game that Kjeragandr once gifted us, then?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: The beasts grow fewer each year. Even water from the springs is less sweet.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: My family made a living hunting in the mountains for generations, following the holy teachings of Kjeragandr, and we show our faith by sculpting statues in Her image.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Dad... myself, and my siblings, we've always prayed to Kjeragandr, always paid our respects.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Why are WE the ones who have to pay the price?!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Spooked by the sudden outburst, the Rift Cloudbeast leaps down from a trembling Joanna and goes over to Enya.
Enya bends down and lifts it up, placing it back on Joanna's shoulder.
Don't move, or your wounds will reopen.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: This is the first time I've heard about any of that.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: If you want to argue, go ahead, Silverash.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: No, I don't.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: I'm... different from the others. I have to stay at home most of the time, and what I know about the land today comes mostly from the accounts of others.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Sometimes I go out and experience things for myself, but it's not enough.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Kjeragandr will never abandon any children of Kjerag. I promise.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Hmph...
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: You better promise yourself that you pull through whatever's going on...
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: What was with those bandits, anyway? I know all the hunters living on the mountain. I didn't recognize any of those guys.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: I think... they came for me.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: For you? Do you have enemies?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Hmm... It's a long story.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: If that's the case, you'd better stay put tonight. They won't give up so easily.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: My dad's friend has a shop in town, and my siblings have been helping out these past few days. I'll go get some medicine from him.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: And get help to fight the bandits.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: No, don't.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Why? Are you afraid to be on your own? I'm fast and strong. I can be back by tomorrow morning if I go down the mountain now.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: That's not what I'm worried about...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Why? You Silverashes are such a bother. If you have something to say, just say it.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: If you can't fight, I have no choice but to get help from town. That's the deal.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Wait, I can tell you—
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Enya hurriedly gets up, tugging at the sleeve of the huntress who is about to leave, causing her own cloak to fall off.
The S-Saintess...?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Actually, I'm...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: I-I'm sorry!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Please, Your Holiness, punish me for my insolence!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: No, I'm not going to punish you...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Please, just sit down...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Enya tries to stop the huntress, but she quickly takes a step back, putting more distance between herself and Enya.
She turns to leave, but then seems to remember something, and spins back around and bows reverentially to Enya, before finally leaving the room.
*sigh*...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: General Gulo...
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: Could you knock on the cheibe door before barging in, Matterhorn boy?
attributes.name: Gulo

attributes.content: What are you doing here?
attributes.name: Gulo

attributes.content: I was accompanying Lady Ensia for a checkup. She suffered a car accident this morning, but fortunately she's unharmed.
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: I was told you were here too, so I thought I should pay a visit—are you alright?
attributes.name: Matterhorn
Gulo
attributes.content: Hmph, just a scratch. But—

attributes.name: Gulo
attributes.content: Wait, you said something happened to the young Silverash lady?

Lady Ensia was delivering something to Sir Enciodes when she suffered a head-on collision with another vehicle on the way to the Vine-Bead Court. It was fortunate that Madam Degenbrecher quickly arrived on the scene.
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: You said she was going to the Vine-Bead Court too?
attributes.name: Gulo

attributes.content: Strange. My master received a summons from the Vine-Bead Court this morning, saying there was a meeting, and it was on the way there that we were struck by falling rocks.
attributes.name: Gulo

attributes.content: ...Did you hear anything from the Browntails?
attributes.name: Gulo

attributes.content: No... not yet, at least. What's the matter with the Browntails?
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: No wonder Sir Arctosz was fuming when he left... I haven't seen him so angry in a long time.
attributes.name: Gulo

attributes.content: But this—argh!
attributes.name: Gulo

attributes.content: Listen, brother, I need you to do me a favor. Can you ask Sir Enciodes to go to the Browntail manor at once?
attributes.name: Gulo

attributes.content: Sir Arctosz is even more hot-headed than I am. I'm afraid he might do something impetuous. Sir Enciodes is the only one who can stop him.
attributes.name: Gulo

attributes.content: I see... I'll let him know immediately.
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: I suggest you get your head checked at the hospital, Arctosz. The symptoms of a mild concussion are easy to miss.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: Don't try to change the subject!
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Answer me! Why is it that only Clan Silverash and mine were attacked, while you Browntails sit safe and sound in your home? What do you know?!
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Everything that I know about what happened today came from you.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: More excuses!
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Even the servants of Silverash knew to show concern, and tell me that Ensia suffered too.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: But what about you? You look like you couldn't care less, like it's nothing more than a piece of snow falling on the ground! Is this the Browntail stance?
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: I apologize for my demeanor. All of Kjerag has suffered in recent days. I ask for your understanding.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: Enough of this hipocrisy.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: We both know there's been gossip going around about the Browntail Witch.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: I never took it seriously. I couldn't care less what you did, as long as you did it for Kjerag and Kjeragandr.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: But now?
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: When did Kjeragandr teach you to stab your allies in the back, Ratatos?
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Watch your words, Arctosz. Do not disrespect Kjeragandr, even if you intend to insult and provoke me.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: Stop dodging the question and answer!
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Was Clan Browntail involved in the attack on me and Ensia?
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: You're wasting your time. I've already told you multiple times: I know nothing about it, and I express my sympathies.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: If that's your final answer, then don't accuse me of going too far.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: What do you mean?
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: Don't think I'm out of Paleroches just because you took Gulo out of action. Before I went out, I told my men when to show.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Clan Browntail's estates will be thoroughly searched. I didn't want to go this far, but I'm afraid Sciurus and her children will have to bear with me a little.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: You dare?!
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: You made me do this, Ratatos!
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: The door to the drawing room flies open without warning. Arctosz draws his sword immediately.
The sharp-eyed Browntail guards raise their weapons too and stand in front of Ratatos.
I take it you've already discussed the incidents that occurred today.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I came for the same reason, and I've reached certain conclusions. Please, stand down.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Seeing that Arctosz has sheathed his sword, Ratatos raises a hand, and her guards hesitantly back off.
Good timing, Enciodes.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: With the leaders of Clans Paleroche and Silverash both present, we demand a thorough audit of Clan Browntail's documents, and cooperation from Clan Browntail in the investigation.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Sorry, Arctosz, but I don't assent to the demand.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: What?
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Why would Ratatos want to get rid of us?
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Assassinating the heads of the other two clans at this moment would only cause even more chaos.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Clan Paleroche has the most warriors, while Clan Silverash runs Karlan Trade.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Ratatos could not hope to keep the situation under control if you and I both died in an accident. Meanwhile, retribution would be swift and harsh.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Am I right?
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Ratatos avoids Enciodes's gaze and nods lightly.
That doesn't explain why Clan Browntail wasn't attacked.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Maybe a coincidence, maybe bad timing. Maybe the attackers had something planned for the Browntails too, and we just don't know about it.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: You won't convince me with talk of coincidences, Enciodes.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Who would have done such a thing, if not Ratatos?
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: This is not a question we can solve in a short time.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Don't forget that there are plenty of people looking to take advantage of the chaos, and take a piece of Kjerag for themselves.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: This assassination coincided with the arrival of Victorian aid. The mastermind wants to keep us from working together.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: The Victorians did this?
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: They are potential suspects, as is any foreign politician who attempts to intervene at this juncture.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Therefore, I would like to maintain the status quo of our previous meeting—I will continue to handle all external affairs, including those involving Victoria.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I will discover the truth, for Clan Paleroche, for the peace of the three clans... and for Ensia.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I'll trust you one last time...
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Hmph...
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: Don't you dare look smug, Ratatos. You got lucky today. You can thank Enciodes and Sciurus.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: If it turns out you're behind all this after all, you'll get what's coming to you!
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: The sturdy Ursus slams the table, then turns and leaves.
Thank you for calming that maniac down, Enciodes.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: But I'm exhausted. I'm sure you understand how tiring it is to deal with baseless accusations.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: If you suspect me and want to question me, I—
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: There's no need for that. Trust between the three clans has never been more important than now.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I have other urgent matters to attend to. I'll take my leave.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Pardon me for not seeing you out.
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: Ensia wasn't hurt. You can rest easy.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: I was the one they were after.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Obviously. The accident was very likely staged. They targeted your car, without knowing who was inside.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Something's not right... it's too forward. It's as though the people behind this want to make the point that they have no qualms about deploying extreme measures.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: They're trying to sow chaos and suspicion. The act itself is more important than the result.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: There is another possibility... perhaps it's not me, Ensia, or Arctosz whom they're truly after.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: There will be trouble on the mountains.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: It's Enya they're after?
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: If anything happens to the Saintess at this point, it will serve to affirm all the conspiracy theories, and drag Kjerag further into the quagmire.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I need you to protect Enya, Degenbrecher.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Enya set out a long time ago. I can't promise anything.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: You need to prepare for the worst.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: I believe in Enya.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: You 'believe'.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: And you will not provide any of your basis for that belief to reassure me? Like you usually do?
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Correct.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I believe.
attributes.name: Enciodes
